name: aheart-ui-workspace
description: Vue 3 component library workspace for aheart-ui.

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter ./packages/components build && corepack pnpm --filter @aheart-ui/dnd build && corepack pnpm --filter @aheart-ui/ai build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter ./packages/components typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @aheart-ui/dnd typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @aheart-ui/ai typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter ./packages/components test && corepack pnpm --filter @aheart-ui/dnd test && corepack pnpm --filter @aheart-ui/ai test
scripts.check:generated: git diff --exit-code -- packages/components/es packages/components/lib packages/dnd/es packages/dnd/lib packages/ai/es packages/ai/lib
scripts.release:check: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm --dir docs build && corepack pnpm check:generated && git diff --check
